message:
feat(replay): decision-diff report generator with 4 output formats (ft-og6q6.5.4)

Human, JSON, Markdown, CSV report formats for decision-diff results.
JSON format provides CI-gate-ready structured output with equivalence levels.
22 unit tests + 18 property tests verify all format invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
